payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_51f78784499a4a6eb2293acd', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import csv\\nimport random\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\n\\n# Configuration\\nNUM_ROWS = 100\\n\\n# Products list\\nPRODUCTS = [\'Laptop\', \'Phone\', \'Tablet\', \'Headphones\', \'Camera\', \'Watch\', \'Speaker\', \'Monitor\', \'Keyboard\', \'Mouse\']\\n\\n# Date range: last 365 days\\nstart_date = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=365)\\n\\ndef random_date():\\n    delta = random.randint(0, 365)\\n    return (start_date + timedelta(days=delta)).strftime(\'%Y-%m-%d\')\\n\\ndef generate_sales_data():\\n    data = []\\n    for _ in range(NUM_ROWS):\\n        row = {\\n            \'Date\': random_date(),\\n            \'Product\': random.choice(PRODUCTS),\\n            \'Price\': round(random.uniform(10, 2000), 2),\\n            \'Quantity\': random.randint(1, 100)\\n        }\\n        data.append(row)\\n    return data\\n\\ndef save_to_csv(data, filename=\'sales_data.csv\'):\\n    with open(filename, \'w\', newline=\'\') as f:\\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=[\'Date\', \'Product\', \'Price\', \'Quantity\'])\\n        writer.writeheader()\\n        writer.writerows(data)\\n\\nif __name__ == \'__main__\':\\n    data = generate_sales_data()\\n    save_to_csv(data)\\n    print(f\\"Generated {NUM_ROWS} rows of sales data -> sales_data.csv\\")", "filename": "generator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
